response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: The reference JSON is incorrect for the first song (00:00 - 01:14), which features the song '偽顔' (Deep Faker), not 'うみゃうにゃはっぴーらいふ'. Thus, manual transcription and translation were required for the first half of the video. The second song at 03:43 matches the reference lyrics. 
2. JSON Usage: The reference JSON was utilized primarily for Scene 3 ('うみゃうにゃはっぴーらいふ'), while Scene 1 and Scene 2 (talk segment) were manually transcribed.
3. Timing & Pacing: Timed dialogue with high precision to capture both songs and the fast-paced chatter of the talk break without cascading delays.

subtitles.original: また淡々と取り繕っている
subtitles.english: Once again, indifferently keeping up appearances,

subtitles.original: 本当の顔は誰のため？
subtitles.english: for whose sake is my real face?

subtitles.original: だんだん苦しくなるね保存
subtitles.english: It's gradually becoming painful, isn't it?

subtitles.original: お揃いの前の前の前の前
subtitles.english: Before, before, before we matched...

subtitles.original: ただ泣いてないで笑っていたいよ
subtitles.english: I don't want to just cry, I want to laugh.

subtitles.original: All eyes on me いつまでも free forever
subtitles.english: All eyes on me, forever free forever...

subtitles.original: 愛なんて分かっちゃいないんだ
subtitles.english: I don't understand love at all.

subtitles.original: All eyes on me いつの日か Deep Faker
subtitles.english: All eyes on me, someday a Deep Faker.

subtitles.original: 脱いでみて
subtitles.english: Try stripping it off,

subtitles.original: 演技でも何でもなら
subtitles.english: even if it's acting or anything,

subtitles.original: それならいっそ剥ぎ取って
subtitles.english: if so, I'd rather tear it away.

subtitles.original: 胸に秘めているディープフェイカー保存
subtitles.english: The Deep Faker hidden in my chest.

subtitles.original: もう泣いたように笑っていたんだ
subtitles.english: I was already laughing as if I had cried.

subtitles.original: All eyes on me 偽りのディープフェイカー
subtitles.english: All eyes on me, the false Deep Faker.

subtitles.original: 愛なんて分かっちゃいないんだ
subtitles.english: I don't understand love at all.

subtitles.original: All eyes on me いつの間にかディープフェイカー
subtitles.english: All eyes on me, before I knew it, a Deep Faker.

subtitles.original: All eyes, all eyes on me, me, me, free
subtitles.english: All eyes, all eyes on me, me, me, free

subtitles.original: All eyes, all eyes on me, Deep Faker保存
subtitles.english: All eyes, all eyes on me, Deep Faker

subtitles.original: All eyes, all eyes on me, me, me, free
subtitles.english: All eyes, all eyes on me, me, me, free

subtitles.original: All eyes, all eyes on me, Deep Faker保存
subtitles.english: All eyes, all eyes on me, Deep Faker

subtitles.original: ふぅ、みんな、どうでしたか？
subtitles.english: Whew... Everyone, how was that?

subtitles.original: いや、今回はですね、あのハウスにね、初めて挑戦したんですけれども
subtitles.english: Well, this time, I took on the challenge of house style for the first time,

subtitles.original: あの、2ヶ月で、あの詰め込んで、踊れてましたか？
subtitles.english: cramming it all in just two months. Was I able to dance it?

subtitles.original: いや、めっちゃ頑張ったってコメントが書いてくれてるんだろうなぁ、へへ。
subtitles.english: Man, I bet there are comments saying 'you worked so hard,' hehe.

subtitles.original: でね、あの「波に名前をつけること」「僕らの呼吸に終わりがあること」って曲では
subtitles.english: And during the songs "Naming the Waves" and "Our Breath Has an End",

subtitles.original: リフトをしたり、あの、クルクルね、回って。あれも初めてやりました。
subtitles.english: we did lifts and spun around in circles. That was my first time doing that too.

subtitles.original: 踊れてたら嬉しいね！
subtitles.english: I hope I managed to dance it well!

subtitles.original: いや、ゲストのね、博衣こより先輩、天音かなた先輩とも一緒に踊って
subtitles.english: Also, I danced with the guests, Hakui Koyori-senpai and Amane Kanata-senpai,

subtitles.original: スバル先輩とは、憧れのスバル先輩と2人っきりでドキドキタイムもしちゃったり
subtitles.english: and I had a heart-pounding moment alone with the Subaru-senpai I look up to!

subtitles.original: ロザ先輩とアキロゼ先輩となでちゃんとは、もう対決しまくって
subtitles.english: I had non-stop face-offs with Roza-senpai, Aki Rose-senpai, and Nade-chan,

subtitles.original: ロゼ先輩とマリンちゃんはカプで、フブキちゃんとはかっこよく、いや〜
subtitles.english: did a couple-like performance with Rose-senpai and Marine-chan, and looked cool with Fubuki-chan!

subtitles.original: ゲストパートもたくさんね、素晴らしいのがあったんじゃないでしょうか！
subtitles.english: There were so many wonderful guest parts, weren't there?

subtitles.original: ということで、皆さん、何か忘れてませんか？
subtitles.english: And so, everyone... aren't you forgetting something?

subtitles.original: ね、皆さん、ちょっと水見の休憩タイムもね、もうそろそろ終わらないといけない。
subtitles.english: Right, everyone? Mizumi's break time has to end pretty soon.

subtitles.original: よし、立つか！
subtitles.english: Alright, let's stand up!

subtitles.original: はい、ということで、なんとですね、こんな感じで言うのも何なんですが、
subtitles.english: Okay, so! It feels a bit casual to announce it like this, but...

subtitles.original: 新曲が出ます！イェーイ！
subtitles.english: My new song is coming out! Yay!

subtitles.original: 初のオリジナル楽曲！ふふふ。やばい、体が疲れた、よいしょ、よいしょ。
subtitles.english: My very first original song! Hehehe. Oh no, my body is tired. Up we go...

subtitles.original: はい、ということで、えっと、作詞・作曲・編曲はナトダニユーさんに作ってもらいました！
subtitles.english: So, yes! The lyrics, composition, and arrangement were done by Natodaniyu-san!

subtitles.original: ありがと、どんどパフパフ、どんどパフパフ！
subtitles.english: Thank you! *drumroll and horns blowing*

subtitles.original: はい、このあとすぐMV公開がね、この配信が終わったあとあるのですが、リダイレクトで飛びます。
subtitles.english: Right after this stream ends, the MV will be released, and you'll be redirected to it.

subtitles.original: そしてデジタルリリースは、今日の0時からなので、たくさん聴いてくれると嬉しいです！
subtitles.english: The digital release starts at midnight tonight, so I hope you listen to it a lot!

subtitles.original: じゃあ、ちょっと早速なんですけれども、その新曲をお披露目しちゃおうかな？
subtitles.english: Now, without further ado, should I perform this new song for you?

subtitles.original: いや、どんな楽曲なんだろう、気になるな。どんな楽曲なんだろう。いきます！
subtitles.english: I wonder what kind of song it is? I'm so curious! Here we go!

subtitles.original: うみゃうにゃ　うみゃうにゃ
subtitles.english: Umyau-nya, umyau-nya

subtitles.original: うみゃうにゃ　うみゃうにゃ保存
subtitles.english: Umyau-nya, umyau-nya

subtitles.original: くるるん　くるるん
subtitles.english: Kururun, kururun

subtitles.original: あー　そろそろごはんの時間かな
subtitles.english: Ah, is it almost mealtime?

subtitles.original: あ　でもでも　やっぱやっぱ
subtitles.english: Ah, but but, still still...

subtitles.original: 家から一歩も出たくないっ
subtitles.english: I don't want to take a single step out of the house!

subtitles.original: こんな時はそうだ！
subtitles.english: In times like this, that's right!

subtitles.original: デリのの音が
subtitles.english: the sound of delivery

subtitles.original: 「説明しよう！極限までお腹を空かし美味しくいただくのだ！」
subtitles.english: Let me explain! To starve myself to the limit, then eat deliciously!

subtitles.original: めんどいめんどいマジめんどいわ
subtitles.english: Troublesome, troublesome, seriously troublesome

subtitles.original: けっきょくぐだぐだ時間溶けたわ
subtitles.english: In the end, time melted away while idling

subtitles.original: ぴろりんぴろりん5回目アラーム
subtitles.english: Beep beep, beep beep, 5th alarm

subtitles.original: コンビニいこー
subtitles.english: Let's go to the convenience store!

subtitles.original: わちゃわちゃはちゃめちゃ奇想天外
subtitles.english: Cluttered, chaotic, unpredictable

subtitles.original: ドタバタてんやわんや見逃せない
subtitles.english: Hectic, topsy-turvy, can't miss it!

subtitles.original: ピンチだってちょちょいのちょいで
subtitles.english: Even in a pinch, in a jiffy,

subtitles.original: てやっ！てやっ！そりゃっ！そりゃっ！
subtitles.english: Te-ya! Te-ya! So-rya! So-rya!

subtitles.original: 万事解決☆
subtitles.english: Everything's resolved!

subtitles.original: うみゃうにゃ うみゃうにゃ おいしくなーれ
subtitles.english: Umyau-nya, umyau-nya, become delicious!

subtitles.original: あれもこれも全部 食べたいな保存
subtitles.english: I want to eat this, that, and everything!

subtitles.original: ぱくぱく うみゃうにゃ ハピネス ライフ
subtitles.english: Munching, umyau-nya, happy life!

subtitles.original: 食べて 寝て 遊んで また食べる！
subtitles.english: Eat, sleep, play, and eat again!

subtitles.original: ペコペコ ペコペコ はらぺこちょ
subtitles.english: Starving, starving, super hungry!

subtitles.original: うみゃうにゃ うみゃうにゃ 食いつくせー！
subtitles.english: Umyau-nya, umyau-nya, eat up everything!
